name: Classic Milk
description: Clean taste and a calm balance for everyday use.

name: Kefir
description: A light tang and a well-balanced taste.

name: Yogurt
description: Delicate texture and a carefully balanced recipe.

name: Mozzarella 400 g
description: A tender cheese made from pasteurized cow’s milk. Great for salads, pizza, and hot dishes.
ingredients: Ingredients: pasteurized cow’s milk, cheese starter culture, salt, emulsifying salts (sodium citrate, sodium phosphates/polyphosphates), thickeners (carrageenan, locust bean gum), stabilizer (calcium chloride), preservative (potassium sorbate), color (beta-carotene). Allergens: milk and dairy products. Contains lactose. Store at +2…+4°C. Milk fat in dry matter — at least 45%. Manufacturer: “Yangi Asr” (farm).

name: Qatiq 3%
description: A classic fermented dairy drink with a mild, smooth taste.

facts.shelfLife: 20 days at +4±2°C; after opening — consume within 24 hours

ingredients: Ingredients: normalized milk, drinking water, iodized salt, starter culture. Storage: +4±2°C, relative humidity about 70%. Production date and best-before date are indicated on the package.

name: Sour Cream
description: Tender sour cream made from normalized cream and starter culture.

facts.shelfLife: 21 days at +4±2°C; after opening — consume within 24 hours

ingredients: Ingredients: normalized cream, starter culture. Storage: +4±2°C. Production date and best-before date are indicated on the package. Manufacturer: “Yangi Asr” (farm).

name: Qaymaq (Milk Cream)
description: Rich, creamy dairy product with a full-bodied taste.

facts.shelfLife: 21 days at +4±2°C; after opening — consume within 24 hours

ingredients: Ingredients: normalized cream. Storage: +4±2°C. Production date and best-before date are indicated on the package. Manufacturer: “Yangi Asr” (farm).

name: Soft Curd (Yumshoq Tvorog)
description: Soft curd made from pasteurized milk and starter culture.

name: “Okhotnichiy” Cheese
description: Firm cheese with a distinctive taste and aroma.
ingredients: Ingredients: pasteurized milk, salt, calcium chloride, natural color, rennet enzyme, herb starter culture.

name: Ayran 1%
ingredients: Ingredients: normalized milk, drinking water, iodized salt, starter culture. Milk fat content: 1%.

name: Ayran with Basil (Rayhon) 1%
description: Light ayran with a subtle basil (rayhon) note.
